scope.name: BRANCH_PROTECTION_ENFORCEMENT_PROOF
scope.purpose: Define the canonical proof object that distinguishes live GitHub branch-protection enforcement from policy declaration alone. Policy declaration is not enforcement proof. Merge legitimacy requires evidence that branch protection is actually active and bound to emitted checks.

canonical_compression.rule_1: Branch protection policy is not enforcement proof.
canonical_compression.rule_2: Merge legitimacy requires evidence that GitHub branch protection is actually active and bound to emitted checks.

required_status_checks_match_emitted_job.rule: Every required_status_check must resolve via an explicit emitted_check_name_mapping entry to a currently emitted GitHub Actions job check-run name. String-matching heuristics are forbidden.

required_approval_count_satisfied.rule: The live branch-protection configuration must require at least one approving review. A configured count of zero is not enforcement.

stale_review_dismissal_enabled.rule: dismiss_stale_reviews_state must be true. If stale reviews are not dismissed on new commits, previously approved states can persist through head changes.

direct_push_to_main_restricted.rule: direct_push_restriction_state must be true. Unrestricted direct push to the target branch bypasses all review and check enforcement.

force_push_disabled.rule: force_push_disabled_state must be true. Permitted force pushes allow history rewriting that undermines commit-SHA-bound proofs.

branch_deletion_disabled.rule: branch_deletion_disabled_state must be true. A deletable protected branch is not a protected branch.

missing_required_check.condition: A required_status_check has no entry in emitted_check_name_mapping

required_check_not_emitted.condition: A mapped check-run name does not appear in the live emitted checks for the current head SHA

stale_required_check.condition: An emitted check-run is present but bound to a prior commit SHA, not the current head SHA

branch_protection_disabled.condition: No branch-protection rule is configured for the target branch

admin_bypass_enabled_without_governance_.condition: admin_bypass_config_enabled is true and no approved governance artifact authorizes the bypass

admin_bypass_used.condition: The observed merge path used admin bypass regardless of bypass configuration state

admin_bypass_determination.rule: admin_bypass must be treated as a hard failure for branch-protection enforcement proof regardless of emergency authority claims.

preo_integration.enforcement_proof_is_not_merge_legitimac: BRANCH_PROTECTION_ENFORCED proves protected-path enforcement only. It does not by itself establish merge legitimacy.
preo_integration.policy_declaration_not_sufficient: Branch protection policy declaration is not a substitute for BRANCH_PROTECTION_ENFORCED.
preo_integration.workflow_success_not_substitute: Workflow success alone is not a substitute for BRANCH_PROTECTION_ENFORCED.

deterministic_artifact.rule: Identical branch-protection configuration inputs must produce identical BRANCH_PROTECTION_ENFORCED or BRANCH_PROTECTION_ENFORCEMENT_INVALID outputs.
